subject: feat(icons): add apple-touch-icon and dual-directory output
body:
Added 180px apple-touch-icon for iOS home screen. Generator now writes
all 7 icons to both assets/images/ and dashboard/public/assets/images/
in one pass — eliminates manual copy step.
